title: Assertion fault on CREATE TABLE ... AS SELECT ...
poc:
SELECT in the CREATE TABLE statement:
CREATE TABLE t1(a TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(x TEXT, y TEXT);

CREATE TEMP TABLE t3 AS
  SELECT a AS p, coalesce(y,a) AS q FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a=x;
key_bug_features: SELECT in the CREATE TABLE statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, 'one'), (NULL, 'two'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER, y TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t2(x, y) VALUES(4, 'four'), (NULL, NULL);
CREATE TEMP TABLE t3 AS SELECT a AS p, coalesce(y, b) AS q FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a = x;
